content.headline: Born in the 3AM Void
content.copy: When the crypto world sleeps, 247420 awakens. Schwepe manifested from the collective psychosis of degens watching 5-minute candles until sunrise.

content.headline: No Roadmap. Just Chaos.
content.copy: We don't have milestones. We have meme moments. No utility. No promises. Just pure, unfiltered digital degeneracy.

content.headline: The 247420 Trifecta
content.copy: 24/7 markets. 420 vibes. Infinite chaos. This isn't just a token—it's a lifestyle for those who know charts only go up when everyone else is sleeping.

sections.title: The Schwepe Commandments
content: Thou shalt not take crypto seriously
Thou shalt meme harder than thou trades
Thou shalt embrace the red candles as they come
Thou shalt remember: WAGMI or WAGMI-n't
Thou shalt never, ever touch grass during bull runs

content.headline: Always Online
content.copy: Time zones are for normies. In 247420, 3AM is peak hour. Sleep deprivation is our competitive advantage.

content.headline: 420 State of Mind
content.copy: That blissed-out detachment where losing 80% feels like a spiritual experience. We're not just holding bags—we're meditating with them.

content.headline: Infinite Loop
content.copy: The cycle never ends: buy the dip, sell the rip, repeat. Find solace in the chaos of perpetual degen.

content.headline: Chaos Over Charts
content.copy: Technical analysis is for people who believe patterns mean anything. We trade vibes. We hold memes. We worship the RNG.

content.headline: Community Over Capital
content.copy: Your fellow degen is worth more than your portfolio. When everyone's down 90%, at least we're down together.

content.headline: Authenticity Over Authority
content.copy: No CEOs. No whitepapers. No VCs. Just anonymous frogs in a digital pond, making noise and hoping someone notices.

title: The 28 Frogs
subtitle: Each One a Glitch in the Matrix

content.headline: 28 Chosen Ones
content.copy: In the vast digital swamp, 28 unique frogs emerged. Each represents a different flavor of degen energy—from the diamond-handed to the paper-handed coward.

content.headline: The Schwepe Effect
content.copy: When all 28 frogs unite, reality bends. Markets move. Memes manifest. The simulation reveals itself.

sections.title: The Frog Archetypes
content: The Diamond Degen: HODLs through -90% with a smile
The Paper Prince: Sells at 2x profit, misses 100x
The FOMO Frog: Always late to every party, always down bad
The Meme Lord: Creates content that pumps harder than fundamentals
The Zen Degen: Loses everything but finds enlightenment

content.headline: The 3AM Sacrifice
content.copy: When the market dips, true Schwepers sacrifice sleep to stare at charts, believing their collective consciousness can reverse the red.

content.headline: The Meme Offering
content.copy: Creating and sharing Schwepe memes isn't just engagement—it's prayer. Each meme is an offering to the algorithm gods.

content.headline: The Paper Hand Confessional
content.copy: Those who sell too early must confess their sins in the group chat and perform penance through 24 hours of non-stop memeing.

sections.title: The Degen Hierarchy
content: The OG: Here since genesis, diamond hands forged in bear market fire
The Prophet: Sees patterns in chaos, guides the flock through red candles
The Meme Sage: Words become memes, memes become pumps
The Discord Devotee: Lives in chat, knows every frog's life story
The Newborn: Fresh from fiat world, still believes in fundamentals

title: Memenomics: The Art of Losing Beautifully
subtitle: Where Emotional Damage Is the Real ROI

content.headline: The Greater Fool Theory
content.copy: There's always someone dumber than you. That's not just investment strategy—it's our core belief system.

content.headline: Vibe-Based Valuation
content.copy: Market cap is determined by meme quality, community vibes, and how much the founders hate each other.

content.headline: The Emotional ROI
content.copy: Financial returns are temporary. The trauma, friendships, and memes are forever. That's the real dividend.

content.headline: The Great Rug
content.copy: Everyone gets rugged, but we meme about it so hard that the rug itself becomes legendary and we all buy the next one anyway.

content.headline: The Moonshot
content.copy: Against all odds, Schwepe actually moons. The OGs sell at 100x, the cultists hodl to zero, and the cycle begins anew.

content.headline: The Zombie Protocol
content.copy: Schwepe enters that beautiful state of being dead yet eternally memeing, achieving immortality through sheer stubbornness.
